clips.note: Textualist and pragmatist clash over statutory text and ground-level reality.
Initial arguments on executive power, independence, and due process.
Jurisdictional and procedural thresholds raised by formalist, minimalist, maximalist.
Foreperson frames debates; originalist and textualist clash over 1789 vs text.
Federalism hawk and civil libertarian debate structural accountability vs individual liberty.
Final exchange on individual burden and executive convenience before the flip.
Federalism hawk flips to affirm, citing lack of state authority implication.
Foreperson convenes the panel and frames the initial question.
